basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) Medical Specialists Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHM Chandigarh under Advertisement No. NHM-UT/06/2026-27. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB/DCH/DGO/Diploma in respective specialty from recognized University, Registration with State Medical Council or Medical Council of India-New Delhi
qualification.details: Radiologist under NHM: MBBS Degree with Diploma/ MD/DNB in Radio diagnosis from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field, CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours Paediatrician under NHM: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Paediatrics/DCH from Recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in Newborn Care Unit/SNCU, CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours Gynaecologist under NHM: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Obs. & Gynaecology/DGO from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field, CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours Epidemiologist (NP-NCD) under NHM: MBBS Degree from Recognized University. MD/DNB in Preventive & Social Medicine/Community Health Administration. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: 2 year's experience in Health Management/Public Health Programme/Health services after obtaining Post Graduate Degree, CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours Microbiologist for IPHL under PMABHIM: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Microbiology from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field, CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours

salary_details.details: Radiologist under NHM: Rs. 1,50,000/- Per Month Paediatrician under NHM: Rs. 1,00,000/- Per Month Gynaecologist under NHM: Rs. 1,00,000/- Per Month Epidemiologist (NP-NCD) under NHM: Rs. 85,000/- Per Month Microbiologist for IPHL under PMABHIM: Rs. 85,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Specialists posts under NHM Chandigarh is scheduled for 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Specialists in NHM Chandigarh?
faq.answer: National Health Mission Chandigarh has announced a total of 6 vacancies for the Medical Specialists positions. These include various specializations like Radiologist, Paediatrician, Gynaecologist, Epidemiologist, and Microbiologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree with MD/DNB/DCH/DGO/Diploma in the respective specialty from a recognized University and must be registered with the State Medical Council or Medical Council of India-New Delhi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Medical Specialists posts is 62 years. There is no mention of minimum age limit or age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Specialists positions ranges from Rs. 85,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- per month, depending on the specific specialization and post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Medical Specialists posts in the NHM Chandigarh recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application for these posts is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will primarily involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the NHM Chandigarh office. Specific venue details and reporting time should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NHM Chandigarh Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Specialists posts under NHM Chandigarh is scheduled for 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.
